author: Leif Jantzen
description: Fetch, clean and embed YouTube video transcripts in your notes. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Leif Jantzen
manifest.description: Fetch, clean and embed YouTube video transcripts in your notes.
manifest.name: YouTube transcript fetcher

name: YouTube transcript fetcher

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## YouTube Transcript Plugin 2.0.16

### Installation
1. Download all files from the assets below
2. Create a folder `obsidian-youtube-transcript` in your vault's `.obsidian/plugins/` directory
3. Place the downloaded files in that folder
4. Reload Obsidian and enable the plugin in Settings → Community plugins

### Files
- `main.js` - Plugin code
- `manifest.json` - Plugin manifest
- `styles.css` - Plugin styles (if present)

See the [README](https://github.com/ljantzen/obsidian-youtube-transcript/blob/main/README.md) for more information.
releases.name: Release 2.0.16
